properties.Mission: Travel2change is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit that reimagines travel as a catalyst for creating positive impact. We provide travelers with unique opportunities that benefit and empower local communities. Travel2change offers volunteering experiences for travelers to join restoration projects in Hawaii.
properties.Goals: We want to transform tourism in a way that it benefits the local communities and environment. We want to connect travelers to volunteering activities around restoration, preservation, cultivation in order to give back and restore this island.
